v2.2.0 · Windows 10 / 11

Download.

No installer, no account setup. Just Download. Launch. Play.

VERSION2.2.0 COMPATIBILITYWindows 10 / 11 PRICEFree
Download Liquid Star .exe File · ~70 MB Browser might warn you — just hit Keep / Allow and run it.

Run it, that's it.

The free features (aimbot, name changer, basic client tweaks) work out-of-the-box on your first launch. Just double-click to start.

Want the rest?

If you want the full toolkit (FEH scan, wallhacks, weapon chams, fake duck, stronger aimbot.), jump into our Discord and open a donation ticket. We'll set you up with full access. No pressure

Open Discord

Antivirus warning?

Yes, Defender or Chrome will probably block it and flag it as a virus. That's a standard false positive because our cheat uses servers for accounts. If you don't trust it, don't run it. If you do, just whitelist the file or directory and play.

Antivirus help
